options.name: appActiveCheckInterval
options.description: A numeric value in seconds as poll interval to check if the system is active from being idle

options.name: screenSharing
options.description: Screen sharing configuration. thumbnail: controls the preview window shown during active sharing. lockInhibitionMethod: screen lock inhibition method (Electron/WakeLockSentinel).

options.name: appIcon
options.description: Teams app icon to show in the tray

options.name: appIconType
options.description: Type of tray icon to be used

options.name: appIdleTimeout
options.description: A numeric value in seconds as duration before app considers the system as idle

options.name: appIdleTimeoutCheckInterval
options.description: A numeric value in seconds as poll interval to check if the appIdleTimeout is reached

options.name: appTitle
options.description: A text to be suffixed with page title

options.name: alwaysOnTop
options.description: Keep the pop-out window always on top of other windows.

options.name: authServerWhitelist
options.description: Set auth-server-whitelist value

options.name: awayOnSystemIdle
options.description: Sets the user status as away when system goes idle

options.name: idleDetection
options.description: Idle detection configuration. forceState: enables state file-based idle control (workaround for Wayland/Hyprland). stateFile: path to state file with $USER expansion support.

options.name: chromeUserAgent
options.default: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/<version> Safari/537.36
options.description: Google Chrome User Agent

options.name: customBGServiceBaseUrl
options.description: Base URL of the server which provides custom background images

options.name: customBGServiceConfigFetchInterval
options.description: A numeric value in seconds as poll interval to download background service config download

options.name: customCACertsFingerprints
options.description: Array of custom CA Certs Fingerprints to allow SSL unrecognized signer or self signed certificate

options.name: customCSSName
options.description: custom CSS name for the packaged available css files. Currently those are: "compactDark", "compactLight", "tweaks", "condensedDark" and "condensedLight"

options.name: customCSSLocation
options.description: custom CSS styles file location

options.name: customStickers
options.description: Custom stickers feature. enabled: master flag (off by default). folder: absolute path to the sticker folder; empty string uses <userData>/stickers/ (auto-created). formats: file extensions to scan (lowercase, no leading dot). The scanner reads the configured folder plus one level of subdirectories so packs imported under <folder>/<pack>/ are visible. urlImport: HTTPS URL import (drop or paste a URL onto the sticker panel); allowedContentTypes restricts what the wrapper will save; maxBytes caps individual file size.

options.name: disableTimestampOnCopy
options.description: Controls whether timestamps are included when copying messages in chats

options.name: class
options.description: A custom value for the WM_CLASS property

options.name: cacheManagement
options.description: Cache management configuration to prevent daily logout issues

options.name: clearStorageData
options.description: Flag to clear storage data. Expects an object of the type https://www.electronjs.org/docs/latest/api/session#sesclearstoragedataoptions

options.name: clientCertPath
options.description: Custom Client Certs for corporate authentication (certificate must be in pkcs12 format)

options.name: clientCertPassword
options.description: Custom Client Certs password for corporate authentication (certificate must be in pkcs12 format)

options.name: closeAppOnCross
options.description: Close the app when clicking the close (X) cross

options.name: defaultNotificationUrgency
options.description: Default urgency for new notifications (low/normal/critical)

options.name: defaultURLHandler
options.description: Default application to be used to open the HTTP URLs

options.name: disableGpu
options.description: A flag to disable GPU and hardware acceleration (can be useful if the window remains blank)

options.name: download
options.description: Download manager configuration. enabled: master switch for the entire feature, defaults to false while the feature is in early development — set true to opt in. notifyOnDownloadComplete: show a system notification when a file download finishes (click opens the containing folder). showProgressBar: drive the taskbar progress bar and KDE JobView / Unity LauncherEntry signals while downloads are in flight. showTitlePrefix: also prefix the window title with [N%] as a portable fallback for environments where the other progress signals aren't rendered; set to false to keep the title untouched when KDE / Ubuntu already show progress elsewhere. All sub-flags only take effect when enabled is true.

options.name: disableNotifications
options.description: A flag to disable all notifications

options.name: disableNotificationSound
options.description: Disable chat/meeting start notification sound

options.name: disableNotificationSoundIfNotAvailable
options.description: Disables notification sound unless status is Available (e.g. while in a call, busy, etc.)

options.name: disableNotificationWindowFlash
options.description: A flag indicates whether to disable window flashing when there is a notification

options.name: notifications
options.description: Notification behaviour. timeoutType: how long notifications stay in the system notification center (Linux/Windows only). Choices: `default` (auto-clear per system policy) or `never` (persist until the user dismisses, useful on GNOME and other desktops that auto-remove notifications). Mirrors Electron's Notification timeoutType. May not be honoured by every notification daemon.

options.name: disableBadgeCount
options.description: A flag indicates whether to disable the badge counter on the taskbar/dock icon

options.name: disableGlobalShortcuts
options.description: Array of global shortcuts to disable while the app is in focus. See https://www.electronjs.org/docs/latest/api/accelerator for available accelerators to use

options.name: globalShortcuts
options.description: Global keyboard shortcuts that work system-wide. Disabled by default (opt-in). See configuration docs for details and limitations

options.name: electronCLIFlags
options.description: Electron CLI flags

options.name: emulateWinChromiumPlatform
options.description: Use windows platform information in chromium. This is helpful if MFA app does not support Linux.

options.name: enableIncomingCallToast
options.description: Enable incoming call toast

options.name: followSystemTheme
options.description: Follow the operating-system dark/light theme preference. Default is true; set false to keep Teams's own theme regardless of OS changes.

options.name: frame
options.description: Specify false to create a Frameless Window. Default is true

options.name: incomingCallCommand
options.description: Command to execute on an incoming call. (caution: "~" in path is not supported)

options.name: incomingCallCommandArgs
options.description: Arguments for the incoming call command.

options.name: isCustomBackgroundEnabled
options.description: A flag indicates whether to enable custom background or not

options.name: logConfig
options.description: Electron-log configuration. See logger.js for configurable values. To disable it provide a Falsy value.

options.name: meetupJoinRegEx
options.description: Regex for Teams meetup-join and related links

options.name: menubar
options.description: A value controls the menu bar behaviour

options.name: minimized
options.description: Start the application minimized

options.name: minimizeOnClose
options.description: Minimize the window when clicking the close (X) cross instead of hiding it to the tray (ignored when closeAppOnCross is true)

options.name: notificationMethod
options.description: Notification method to be used by the application (web/electron/custom)

options.name: customNotification
options.description: Custom in-app notification system configuration

options.name: onNewWindowOpenMeetupJoinUrlInApp
options.description: Open meetupJoinRegEx URLs in the app instead of the default browser

options.name: partition
options.description: BrowserWindow webpreferences partition

options.name: proxyServer
options.description: Proxy Server with format address:port

options.name: network
options.description: Network configuration. webRTCIPHandlingPolicy: WebRTC IP handling policy to control which network interfaces are used for ICE candidates. Use 'default_public_interface_only' to prevent WebRTC from advertising interfaces that have no internet route (e.g. a secondary ethernet adapter), which can cause calls to drop to OnHold due to asymmetric STUN routing. Valid values: 'default', 'default_public_and_private_interfaces', 'default_public_interface_only', 'disable_non_proxied_udp'. Disabled by default (opt-in). disableQuic: Append Chromium's --disable-quic switch at startup. Defaults to true to work around issue #2518 (concurrent SharePoint downloads abort with ERR_QUIC_PROTOCOL_ERROR on the shared QUIC session). Set to false to re-enable QUIC if a future Chromium release fixes the underlying transport bug.

options.name: spellCheckerLanguages
options.description: Array of languages to use with Electron's spell checker (experimental)

options.name: ssoBasicAuthUser
options.description: User to use for SSO basic auth.

options.name: ssoBasicAuthPasswordCommand
options.description: Command to execute to retrieve password for SSO basic auth.

options.name: trayIconEnabled
options.description: Enable tray icon

options.name: msTeamsProtocols
options.description: Regular expressions for Microsoft Teams protocol links (v1 and v2).

options.name: url
options.description: Microsoft Teams URL

options.name: useMutationTitleLogic
options.description: Use MutationObserver to update counter from title

options.name: watchConfigFile
options.description: Watch for changes in the config file and reload the app

options.name: webDebug
options.description: Enable debug at start

options.name: media
options.description: Media settings for microphone, camera, and video

options.name: mqtt
options.description: MQTT configuration for publishing Teams status updates and receiving action commands

options.name: quickChat
options.description: Quick Chat configuration for quick access to chat contacts and inline messaging via Graph API

options.name: graphApi
options.description: Microsoft Graph API integration for enhanced Teams functionality (calendar, user profile, etc.)

options.name: auth
options.description: Authentication configuration. auth.webauthn.enabled turns on hardware security key support on Linux (requires fido2-tools). auth.webauthn.debug enables verbose diagnostic logs, intended for beta testers only. auth.reauthRecovery.enabled opts into aggressive in-app recovery from stale sessions and is off by default. When on it does two things: it intercepts the Microsoft login popup opened by the stale 'sign in again' banner and recovers in-app (clearing stale auth state and reloading) instead of opening the popup externally, and it treats uncaught Teams worker 'UPR' errors as auth-failure signals that trigger the same in-app recovery. The reliable MSAL InteractionRequired signal always triggers recovery regardless of this flag; worker UPR errors are gated behind it because they also fire routinely in healthy sessions and would otherwise cause periodic false-positive reloads. Interception only happens when the session has emitted a trusted auth-failure signal within the last hour, so login popups from healthy flows (initial sign-in, consent and step-up prompts, adding an account) are never diverted. During an active call, recovery is never run silently (it would end the call): the user is asked whether to sign in now, after the call, or not at all.

options.name: multiAccount
options.description: Multi-account profile switcher configuration (see ADR-020). enabled: opt-in flag for the single-window multi-tenant switcher. Mutually exclusive with auth.intune.enabled; when both are true a startup warning is logged and multi-account is disabled for the session.

options.name: wayland
options.description: Wayland display server configuration. xwaylandOptimizations: keeps GPU enabled and skips fake media UI flag under XWayland (may fix camera issues but can break screen sharing)
